title: Mob Pouches - Pouchable Villagers
description: An example data pack for the Mob Pouches mod that allows Villagers to be pouchable.
body:
This data pack is for use with the [Mob Pouches](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-pouches) mod and will not function without it.

This data pack adds Villagers to the list of pouchable mobs, allowing them to be relocated using pouches without any changes to the game rules.
